title: Packer Cheat Sheet
description: Essential Packer CLI commands for building and managing machine images.

commands.description: Initialize a Packer template and install plugins.
commands.scenario: Use when setting up a new Packer template to ensure all required plugins are installed.

commands.description: Validate a Packer template for syntax errors.
commands.scenario: Use to ensure your Packer template is correctly formatted before building.

commands.description: Build an image from a Packer template.
commands.scenario: Use to create a machine image using the specified Packer template.

commands.description: Inspect a Packer template to see available variables and builders.
commands.scenario: Use to understand the components and variables in a Packer template.

commands.description: Launch an interactive console for evaluating HCL2 expressions.
commands.scenario: Use to test and evaluate expressions in your Packer templates interactively.

commands.description: Update an old JSON template to the latest format.
commands.scenario: Use to convert older Packer templates to the latest JSON format.

commands.description: Format a Packer template to the standard style.
commands.scenario: Use to automatically format your Packer template for consistency.
Use to check which version of Packer is installed on your system.

commands.description: Upgrade a JSON template to HCL2 format.
commands.scenario: Use to migrate JSON templates to the HCL2 format for better readability and features.
Use to see which plugins are currently installed and available for use.

commands.description: Build an image using only the specified builder.
commands.scenario: Use to target a specific builder in a multi-builder template.

commands.description: Pass variables to a Packer build command.
commands.scenario: Use to override or specify variables at build time.
